name: Heian Nidan
description: The second kata in the Heian series, introducing back stance, knife-hand blocks, side kicks, and spear-hand techniques. Originally the first Pinan kata created by Master Itosu, but reordered by Master Funakoshi due to its complexity.

subMoves.hiragana: れい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: むすびだち
subMoves.description: From the musubi-dachi position, bow (rei) with the hands placed on the thighs

subMoves.hiragana: ようい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: はちじだち
subMoves.description: From the musubi-dachi position, step out to hachiji-dachi position and assume the ready stance (yōi) with fists clenched.

moves.japaneseName: Hidari jōdan tate-uke / Migi zenwan hitae-mae

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり じょうだん はいわんうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Turn head left, advance left foot 90° into back stance with high left vertical block and right upper guard (haiwan-uke)

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ぜんわん ひたいまえ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Right forearm performs horizontal protection of forehead

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ながしうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Left flowing block (soto-uke) with back of hand outward. Turn body slightly towards the "opponent"

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ そとまわしうち
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Right hammerfist blow from the outside as if hitting an elbow

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん よこづき
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Left middle-level side punch to the left, right fist in hikite. Turn the body away from the "opponent" into profile

moves.japaneseName: Migi jōdan haiwan-uke / Hidari zenwan hitae-mae

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ じょうだん はいわんうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Turn head right, rotate 180° into back stance with high right vertical block and left upper guard (haiwan-uke)

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ぜんわん ひたいまえ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Left forearm performs horizontal protection of forehead

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ながしうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Rifht flowing block (soto-uke) with back of hand outward. Turn body slightly towards the "opponent"

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり そとまわしうち
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Left hammerfist blow from the outside as if hitting an elbow

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん よこづき
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Right middle-level side punch to the right, left fist in hikite. Turn the body away from the "opponent" into profile

moves.japaneseName: Migi jōdan uraken yoko-mawashi-uchi / Migi yoko-geri keage

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり じょうだん うらけん よこまわしうち
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり あしだち
subMoves.description: Turn toes to the right, move left foot halfway towards the right foot. Turn the hips and body clockwise. As the hips turn, lift the right leg until the sole touches the left knee (pointing the right knee to the right). Simultaneously, bring the right fist to the left hip (on top of the left fist).

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ じょうだん うらけん よこまわしうち
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり あしだち
subMoves.description: Right upper-level back-fist circular strike while preparing for side kick. Fist stays out

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん よこげりけあげ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり あしだち
subMoves.description: Right upward side snap kick with sword foot, performed simultaneously with back-fist. The right foot should quickly snap back to the left knee after the kick

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Land naturally, turn left 90° into back stance with left middle-level knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Advance right foot forward into back stance with right middle-level knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Advance left foot forward into back stance with left middle-level knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん しほんぬきて
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Advance right foot into front stance with right vertical spear-hand thrust

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり おさえうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Left pressing block folded in front during forward movement

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Pivot on right foot 90° counter-clockwise to rear, move left foot into back stance with left knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Pivot on left foot 45° to right, advance right foot into back stance with right knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Pivot on left foot 45° to right, advance right foot into back stance with right knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん しゅとうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ こうくつだち
subMoves.description: Pivot on right foot 45° to left, advance left foot into back stance with left knife-hand block

subMoves.hiragana: ぎゃくはんみ みぎ ちゅうだん うちうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだりあし ぜんくつ
subMoves.description: Move left foot in 45° arc to left, rotate into wide front stance with right inside forearm block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ まえげりけあげ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり あしだち
subMoves.description: Right front snap kick to middle level without upper body movement

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん ぎゃくづき
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Bring right leg back after kick, land forward in front stance with left reverse punch

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり ちゅうだん うちうでうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎあし ぜんくつ
subMoves.description: Turn hips powerfully right without removing weight from front leg, left inside forearm block

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり まえげりけあげ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ あしだち
subMoves.description: Left front snap kick to middle level without upper body movement

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん ぎゃくづき
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Bring left leg back after kick, land forward in front stance with right reverse punch

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ ちゅうだん もろてうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Move right foot forward, augmented block from inside to outside, left arm against trunk

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり げだんばらい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Move left foot to pivot in anti-clockwise 70° arc to left rear while rotating the body on the right heel into front stance with left downward block. The feet should be on an E-W line

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり しゅとう あげうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: left knife-hand rising block preparation

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ じょうだん あげうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Advance right foot into front stance with right upper-level rising block

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ げだんばらい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: みぎ ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Move right foot in circular arc to rear, turn 135° into front stance with right downward block. The feet should be on an E-W line

subMoves.hiragana: みぎ しゅとう あげうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Right knife-hand rising block preparation

subMoves.hiragana: ひだり じょうだん あげうけ
subMoves.stanceHiragana: ひだり ぜんくつだち
subMoves.description: Advance left foot into front stance with left upper-level rising block and kiai

subMoves.hiragana: ようい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: はちじだち
subMoves.description: Step back to hachiji-dachi position and assume the ready stance (yōi)

subMoves.hiragana: れい
subMoves.stanceHiragana: むすびだち
subMoves.description: From the musubi-dachi position, bow (rei) with the hands placed on the thighs
